---
name: Editorial issue
about: A typo, wording, formatting, or clarity problem that does not change wire behavior
title: "[editorial] "
labels: ["editorial"]
---

**Draft revision**
Which revision does this concern? (e.g., `draft-bubblefish-npamp-01`)

**Location**
Section, paragraph, or line.

**Issue**
Describe the typo, unclear wording, or formatting problem.

**Suggested wording (optional)**
Proposed replacement text.

> Note: editorial issues must not change what an implementation does on the
> wire. If the change affects behavior, use the "Specification issue" template
> instead.
